title: Sri Perungaraiyadi Meenda Ayyanar Temple

heroImage.alt: Sri Perungaraiyadi Meenda Ayyanar Temple, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Sri Perungaraiyadi Meenda Ayyanar Temple (Tamil: ஸ்ரீ பெருங்காரையடி மீண்ட ஐயனார் கோவில்) is one of the famous temple in Pudukkottai District , Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Sri Perungaraiyadi Meenda Ayyanar Temple (Tamil: ஸ்ரீ பெருங்காரையடி மீண்ட ஐயனார் கோவில்) is one of the famous temple in Pudukkottai District , Tamil Nadu. It is located at Kulamangalam in Alangudi Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Avanathankottai
topPlaces.description: Avanathankottai is a village in the Aranthangi revenue block of Pudukkottai district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Periyalur
topPlaces.description: Periyalur is a village in Pudukkottai District in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is populated by approximately one thousand families.

topPlaces.name: Pandikkudi
topPlaces.description: Pandikkudi (Pāṇṭikkuṭi) is a village in Pudukkottai District in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is populated by approximately above Hundred families.

topPlaces.name: Keeramangalam
topPlaces.description: Keeramangalam is a panchayat town in Pudukkottai District in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located in Alangudi taluk.

topPlaces.name: Rajendrapuram
topPlaces.description: Rajendrapuram is a village in the Aranthangi revenue block of Pudukkottai district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Vadakadu
topPlaces.description: Vadakadu is one of the largest villages in Alangudi, Tamil Nadu, India. Mariamman Temple is a Hindu temple in the village.

topPlaces.name: Kollanvayal
topPlaces.description: Kollanvayal is a village located in Aranthangi Taluk of Pudukkottai district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. Kollanvayal is situated 2 km away from Silattur, 10 km away from sub-district headquarter Aranthangi and 25 km away from district headquarter Pudukkottai.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sri Perungaraiyadi Meenda Ayyanar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sri Perungaraiyadi Meenda Ayyanar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sri Perungaraiyadi Meenda Ayyanar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (66 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (70 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sri Perungaraiyadi Meenda Ayyanar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sri Perungaraiyadi Meenda Ayyanar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sri Perungaraiyadi Meenda Ayyanar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Sri Perungaraiyadi Meenda Ayyanar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sri Perungaraiyadi Meenda Ayyanar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Avanathankottai, Periyaloor, Periyalur, Pandikkudi, Keeramangalam.
